questions.stem:
—_____ you ever _____ to the Shenzhen Science Museum?
—Yes, I _____ there last month.
questions.explanation: 考查现在完成时与一般过去时的区别。第一空：ever（曾经）是现在完成时的标志词，结构为have/has+过去分词，排除A、D；第二空：have been to表示"去过某地（已回）"，have gone to表示"去了某地（未回）"，根据答句可知人已回来，用have been；第三空：last month（上个月）是明确的过去时间状语，必须用一般过去时went。故选B。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The book _____ cover is red belongs to my sister.
questions.explanation: 考查定语从句关系词的选择。先行词是The book（物），但空格后接的是cover（封面），表示"书的封面"，即先行词与cover之间存在所属关系。在定语从句中，whose可指人或物，在从句中作定语，表示"...的"。which和that在从句中作主语或宾语；who指人。故选C。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The environment _____ by all of us.
questions.explanation: 考查含情态动词的被动语态。主语The environment（环境）与protect（保护）之间是被动关系，应用被动语态。含情态动词的被动语态结构为：情态动词+be+及物动词的过去分词。should后接动词原形，排除C、D；A是主动语态，故选B。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem:
—Is that Mr. Wang knocking at the door?
—It _____ be him. He has gone to Shanghai on business.
questions.explanation: 考查情态动词表推测的用法。must be表示"一定是"（肯定推测），may/might be表示"可能是"（不确定推测），can't be表示"不可能是"（否定推测）。根据后句"He has gone to Shanghai on business"（他去上海出差了，人还没回来），可推断敲门的不可能是他，应用否定推测can't。故选C。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The weather was terrible yesterday. It was raining heavily and the wind was blowing _____.
questions.explanation: 考查副词辨析及语境理解。修饰动词blowing（吹）需用副词。strongly（猛烈地）可修饰风、雨等；heavy（重的）是形容词；big（大的）是形容词；hardly（几乎不）是副词，但意义不符。形容风大应用blow strongly。故选A。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: We should _____ our best to protect the environment.
questions.explanation: 考查固定搭配。try one's best是固定短语，意为"尽某人最大努力"，后接to do sth.。do one's best也可表示尽力，但本题选项中只有try符合搭配习惯；make one's best无此搭配；take one's best无此搭配。故选A。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: The _____ news made all of us very _____.
questions.explanation: 考查-ing形容词与-ed形容词的区别。exciting（令人兴奋的）修饰物或事，excited（感到兴奋的）修饰人。第一空修饰news（消息，物），用exciting；第二空修饰us（我们，人），用excited。故选C。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.explanation: 考查动词/动词短语辨析。participate in是固定搭配，意为"参加（活动）"，符合语境。join后常接组织或人；take part后需加in才能接宾语；attend后常接会议、课程等。空格后有in，且主语是students，故选D。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage: Last month, our school organized an environmental protection activity. All the students were asked to (8)_____ in it. The activity was held in the school garden. We were divided into several groups. My group was responsible for (9)_____ the rubbish in the corner. At first, some of us thought it was (10)_____ work and didn't want to do it. However, when we saw the garden becoming cleaner and cleaner, we felt a strong sense of (11)_____. Through this activity, we realized that protecting the environment is not just a slogan but something we should do in our (12)_____ life.

questions.explanation: 考查动词短语辨析。pick up意为"捡起"，put up意为"张贴、搭建"，turn up意为"调大（音量）、出现"，give up意为"放弃"。根据宾语the rubbish（垃圾）可知，此处表示"捡垃圾"，应用picking up。故选A。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage: Last month, our school organized an environmental protection activity. All the students were asked to (8)_____ in it. The activity was held in the school garden. We were divided into several groups. My group was responsible for (9)_____ the rubbish in the corner. At first, some of us thought it was (10)_____ work and didn't want to do it. However, when we saw the garden becoming cleaner and cleaner, we felt a strong sense of (11)_____. Through this activity, we realized that protecting the environment is not just a slogan but something we should do in our (12)_____ life.

questions.explanation: 考查情感线索与语境推理。根据后文"didn't want to do it"（不想做）可知，一开始大家认为这项工作很"无聊"。interesting（有趣的）、exciting（令人兴奋的）、relaxing（令人放松的）均与"不想做"的态度相反；boring（无聊的）符合语境。故选B。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage: Last month, our school organized an environmental protection activity. All the students were asked to (8)_____ in it. The activity was held in the school garden. We were divided into several groups. My group was responsible for (9)_____ the rubbish in the corner. At first, some of us thought it was (10)_____ work and didn't want to do it. However, when we saw the garden becoming cleaner and cleaner, we felt a strong sense of (11)_____. Through this activity, we realized that protecting the environment is not just a slogan but something we should do in our (12)_____ life.

questions.explanation: 考查语境理解与名词辨析。根据前文"saw the garden becoming cleaner and cleaner"（看到花园变得越来越干净），可推断我们产生了"成就感"。a sense of achievement意为"成就感"；duty（责任）、humor（幽默）、danger（危险）均不符合语境。故选B。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage: Last month, our school organized an environmental protection activity. All the students were asked to (8)_____ in it. The activity was held in the school garden. We were divided into several groups. My group was responsible for (9)_____ the rubbish in the corner. At first, some of us thought it was (10)_____ work and didn't want to do it. However, when we saw the garden becoming cleaner and cleaner, we felt a strong sense of (11)_____. Through this activity, we realized that protecting the environment is not just a slogan but something we should do in our (12)_____ life.

questions.explanation: 考查形容词作定语。daily是形容词，意为"日常的"，可修饰名词life，daily life意为"日常生活"。every day和each day是副词短语，不能修饰名词；today（今天）意义不符。故选A。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage: Last month, our school organized an environmental protection activity. All the students were asked to (8)_____ in it. The activity was held in the school garden. We were divided into several groups. My group was responsible for (9)_____ the rubbish in the corner. At first, some of us thought it was (10)_____ work and didn't want to do it. However, when we saw the garden becoming cleaner and cleaner, we felt a strong sense of (11)_____. Through this activity, we realized that protecting the environment is not just a slogan but something we should do in our (12)_____ life.

questions.stem: What problem did Peesapaty want to solve?
options: A. People didn't have enough spoons to use.
B. The plastic waste from disposable spoons.
C. The spoons were too expensive to buy.
D. The spoons were not strong enough.
questions.explanation: 细节理解题。根据文章第二句"He was worried about the plastic waste from disposable spoons."（他担心一次性勺子产生的塑料垃圾），可知Peesapaty想要解决的是一次性勺子造成的塑料污染问题。A、C、D在文中均未提及。故选B。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解
questions.group_passage: Narayana Peesapaty is an Indian researcher. He was worried about the plastic waste from disposable (一次性的) spoons. Every year, millions of plastic spoons are thrown away and they take hundreds of years to break down. Peesapaty wanted to find a better way. He spent years testing different recipes and finally created edible (可食用的) spoons made from rice, wheat, and sorghum (高粱). These spoons can be eaten after use or will break down in nature within days if thrown away. The spoons come in different flavors like ginger and cinnamon. Now his company sells thousands of spoons every day. "I hope this can reduce plastic pollution and make our planet greener," Peesapaty said.

questions.stem: Why did Peesapaty spend years testing different recipes?
options: A. Because he had plenty of free time.
B. Because he wanted to make sure the spoons were practical and tasty.
C. Because he couldn't find enough rice and wheat.
D. Because he wanted to make the spoons look more beautiful.
questions.explanation: 推理判断题。根据文章第四句"He spent years testing different recipes and finally created edible spoons made from rice, wheat, and sorghum."以及后文"The spoons come in different flavors"（勺子有不同口味），可推断他花费数年时间是为了确保勺子既实用（能吃）又好吃（有不同口味）。A选项与文意不符；C、D在文中无依据。故选B。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断
questions.group_passage: Narayana Peesapaty is an Indian researcher. He was worried about the plastic waste from disposable (一次性的) spoons. Every year, millions of plastic spoons are thrown away and they take hundreds of years to break down. Peesapaty wanted to find a better way. He spent years testing different recipes and finally created edible (可食用的) spoons made from rice, wheat, and sorghum (高粱). These spoons can be eaten after use or will break down in nature within days if thrown away. The spoons come in different flavors like ginger and cinnamon. Now his company sells thousands of spoons every day. "I hope this can reduce plastic pollution and make our planet greener," Peesapaty said.

questions.stem: What does the underlined phrase "break down" mean in the passage?
questions.explanation: 词义猜测题。根据上下文，普通塑料勺子需要数百年才能"break down"，而可食用勺子几天内就能在大自然中"break down"，且主语是spoons，结合环保主题，可推断break down在此处意为"分解"（生物降解）。其他选项代入语境均不通顺。故选A。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测
questions.group_passage: Narayana Peesapaty is an Indian researcher. He was worried about the plastic waste from disposable (一次性的) spoons. Every year, millions of plastic spoons are thrown away and they take hundreds of years to break down. Peesapaty wanted to find a better way. He spent years testing different recipes and finally created edible (可食用的) spoons made from rice, wheat, and sorghum (高粱). These spoons can be eaten after use or will break down in nature within days if thrown away. The spoons come in different flavors like ginger and cinnamon. Now his company sells thousands of spoons every day. "I hope this can reduce plastic pollution and make our planet greener," Peesapaty said.

questions.stem: What is the best title for the passage?
options: C. Edible Spoons: A Solution to Plastic Waste
questions.explanation: 主旨大意题。文章主要介绍了印度研究员Peesapaty发明可食用勺子以解决塑料污染问题的故事。A选项过于宽泛；B、D只是文章细节。C选项"可食用勺子：塑料垃圾的解决方案"既点明了说明对象（edible spoons），又点明了其意义（solution to plastic waste），最能概括全文主旨。故选C。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意
questions.group_passage: Narayana Peesapaty is an Indian researcher. He was worried about the plastic waste from disposable (一次性的) spoons. Every year, millions of plastic spoons are thrown away and they take hundreds of years to break down. Peesapaty wanted to find a better way. He spent years testing different recipes and finally created edible (可食用的) spoons made from rice, wheat, and sorghum (高粱). These spoons can be eaten after use or will break down in nature within days if thrown away. The spoons come in different flavors like ginger and cinnamon. Now his company sells thousands of spoons every day. "I hope this can reduce plastic pollution and make our planet greener," Peesapaty said.

options: A. However, it's not easy to stick to good habits.
B. Then, check your plan every evening to see if you have finished everything.
C. Here are three ways to help you.
D. In addition, it can improve your concentration in class.
E. As a result, you will become healthier and stronger.
questions.explanation: 考查段落衔接与总分结构。空格前提出"养成好习惯很重要"，空格后开始列举First...Second...Third...，因此此处需要一个承上启下的总起句，引出下文的三个方法。C选项"这里有三个方法可以帮助你"符合总分结构。故选C。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage: Developing good habits is important for middle school students. (17)_____ First, make a plan. Write down what you need to do every day. (18)_____ Second, take exercise regularly. It helps you stay healthy and energetic. (19)_____ Third, read books in your free time. Reading opens up a whole new world to you. (20)_____ If you follow these suggestions, you will surely make progress.

options: A. However, it's not easy to stick to good habits.
B. Then, check your plan every evening to see if you have finished everything.
C. Here are three ways to help you.
D. In addition, it can improve your concentration in class.
E. As a result, you will become healthier and stronger.
questions.explanation: 考查逻辑关系与代词指代。空格前讲"制定计划，写下每天要做的事"，空格处应承接"计划"这一话题。B选项"然后，每晚检查你的计划，看看是否完成了所有事情"中的plan与前文呼应，Then也体现了时间顺序。故选B。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage: Developing good habits is important for middle school students. (17)_____ First, make a plan. Write down what you need to do every day. (18)_____ Second, take exercise regularly. It helps you stay healthy and energetic. (19)_____ Third, read books in your free time. Reading opens up a whole new world to you. (20)_____ If you follow these suggestions, you will surely make progress.

options: A. However, it's not easy to stick to good habits.
B. Then, check your plan every evening to see if you have finished everything.
C. Here are three ways to help you.
D. In addition, it can improve your concentration in class.
E. As a result, you will become healthier and stronger.
questions.explanation: 考查因果关系。空格前讲"定期锻炼，这有助于保持健康和精力充沛"，空格处应说明锻炼带来的结果。E选项"因此，你会变得更健康、更强壮"是锻炼的直接结果，As a result体现了因果关系。故选E。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage: Developing good habits is important for middle school students. (17)_____ First, make a plan. Write down what you need to do every day. (18)_____ Second, take exercise regularly. It helps you stay healthy and energetic. (19)_____ Third, read books in your free time. Reading opens up a whole new world to you. (20)_____ If you follow these suggestions, you will surely make progress.

options: A. However, it's not easy to stick to good habits.
B. Then, check your plan every evening to see if you have finished everything.
C. Here are three ways to help you.
D. In addition, it can improve your concentration in class.
E. As a result, you will become healthier and stronger.
questions.explanation: 考查递进关系。空格前讲"阅读为你打开一个全新的世界"，空格处应补充阅读的另一个好处。D选项"此外，它能提高你课堂上的专注力"中的In addition（此外）表示递进，it指代reading，符合语境。故选D。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage: Developing good habits is important for middle school students. (17)_____ First, make a plan. Write down what you need to do every day. (18)_____ Second, take exercise regularly. It helps you stay healthy and energetic. (19)_____ Third, read books in your free time. Reading opens up a whole new world to you. (20)_____ If you follow these suggestions, you will surely make progress.
